# Overview [CURRENT] — package: overview — rendered: 2026-04-13T22:04:13Z

The ACP (Agent Communication Protocol) module (`acp-cdc-ai/`) bridges the ACP Kotlin SDK with the Java application. It owns the chat model abstraction that every LLM call flows through, the session lifecycle that manages conversation state, the event/artifact system that all modules publish to, the sandbox translation layer that maps agent profiles to execution environments, the MCP client/server integration, and the shared filter instruction types used by the data-layer pipelines.

# ACP Chat Model and Session Lifecycle [CURRENT] — package: acp-chat-model-session — rendered: 2026-04-13T22:04:13Z

References: 9 files tracked (package: acp-chat-model-session) — see `$.sections["ACP Chat Model and Session Lifecycle"]` in .metadata/HEAD

`AcpChatModel` (Kotlin) is the central LLM abstraction — every agent call ultimately flows through it. It manages the ACP transport, serializes requests, handles streaming responses via `AcpStreamWindowBuffer`, and routes to the correct provider via `AcpResolvedCall`. `AcpSessionManager` owns the lifecycle of chat sessions (create, resume, close), keyed by `AcpSessionRoutingKey`. `AcpSessionRetryContext` tracks retry state per session, and `AcpRetryEventListener` handles retry events at the protocol level. `CompactionException` signals when a conversation exceeds the context window.

# Event and Artifact System [CURRENT] — package: event-artifact-system — rendered: 2026-04-13T22:04:13Z

References: 14 files tracked (package: event-artifact-system) — see `$.sections["Event and Artifact System"]` in .metadata/HEAD

The event system (`acp/events/`) defines the publish/subscribe contract used by all modules. `EventBus` is the central dispatcher; `EventListener` is the subscription interface. `Events` contains the sealed hierarchy of `GraphEvent` subtypes (action started/completed, propagation, interrupt, etc.). `ArtifactKey` provides hierarchical identity for all artifacts (parent/child relationships via `createChild()`). `Artifact` and `MessageStreamArtifact` carry typed payloads. `ArtifactHashing` and `CanonicalJson` ensure deterministic content addressing. `EventNode` maps events to graph node positions. `AgUiEventMappingRegistry` and `AgUiSerdes` handle AG-UI protocol event translation.

# Sandbox Translation [CURRENT] — package: sandbox-translation — rendered: 2026-04-13T22:04:13Z

References: 7 files tracked (package: sandbox-translation) — see `$.sections["Sandbox Translation"]` in .metadata/HEAD

The sandbox layer (`sandbox/`) translates between logical agent profiles and concrete execution environments. `SandboxTranslationRegistry` holds all registered `SandboxTranslationStrategy` implementations. `ClaudeCodeSandboxStrategy` and `CodexSandboxStrategy` implement profile-specific argument translation (workspace paths, permission flags, model selection). `SandboxContext` carries the resolved sandbox configuration through the decorator chain. `SandboxArgUtils` provides shared argument manipulation utilities.

# MCP Integration [CURRENT] — package: mcp-integration — rendered: 2026-04-13T22:04:13Z

References: 5 files tracked (package: mcp-integration) — see `$.sections["MCP Integration"]` in .metadata/HEAD

`DynamicMcpToolCallbackProvider` dynamically registers MCP tools discovered at runtime. `RequiredProtocolProperties` defines the MCP connection configuration. The `io.modelcontextprotocol` package overrides (`IdeMcpServer`, `IdeMcpAsyncServer`, `DelegatingHttpClientStreamableHttpTransport`) customize the standard MCP server/client transport for IDE-specific needs.

# Filter Instruction Types [CURRENT] — package: filter-instruction-types — rendered: 2026-04-13T22:04:13Z

References: 9 files tracked (package: filter-instruction-types) — see `$.sections["Filter Instruction Types"]` in .metadata/HEAD

The `acp/filter/` package defines the shared instruction model used by all three data-layer pipelines (filter, propagation, transformation). `Instruction` is the base command type. `FilteredObject` wraps payloads that have been through filter evaluation. `FilterEnums` defines filter actions (PASSTHROUGH, TRANSFORMED, DROPPED). `InstructionMatcher` and `InstructionJson` handle matching and serialization. The `path/` subpackage (`JsonPath`, `MarkdownPath`, `RegexPath`, `Path`) defines the typed path system for targeting specific content locations within filtered payloads.

# ACP Configuration [CURRENT] — package: acp-configuration — rendered: 2026-04-13T22:04:13Z

References: 9 files tracked (package: acp-configuration) — see `$.sections["ACP Configuration"]` in .metadata/HEAD

`AcpModelProperties` defines the available LLM providers and their connection parameters. `AcpProvider` and `AcpProviderDefinition` model the provider registry. `AcpProviderConverter` handles Spring property binding. `AcpChatOptionsString` serializes chat options for the protocol. `McpProperties` configures MCP server connections. `ChatMemoryContext` provides the conversation memory interface. `AcpSerializerTransport` (Kotlin) implements the custom serialization transport layer. `AcpUtils` (Kotlin) provides shared protocol utilities. `IPermissionGate` (Kotlin) defines the permission check contract used by interrupt handling.

# Request Context [CURRENT] — package: request-context — rendered: 2026-04-13T22:04:13Z

References: 2 files tracked (package: request-context) — see `$.sections["Request Context"]` in .metadata/HEAD

`RequestContext` and `RequestContextRepository` provide per-request state storage, used by the decorator chain to pass context between request and result decorators within a single agent execution.
